Real impact, transparent

Fatima now feeds 3 families from her garden

A €60.90 donation for 609 plastic-bottle drip irrigation units built Fatima's fresh water and gardening system. Today she's the food security anchor for an entire refugee community of 20 people in the Kakuma Refugee Camp.

Project completed March 2026 · 100% funded by 1 donor
Donate now →

How it works

Simple. Transparent. Direct.

No middlemen. No admin layers. Refugee communities propose projects, you fund them, everyone tracks the impact.

1

Communities propose

Refugee teams describe water and farming projects suited to their climate, terrain, and immediate needs.

2

You select and fund

Browse full project budgets, timelines, and success metrics. Pick the projects that resonate with you.

3

Track real impact

Receive photo updates and verified metrics showing exactly how your donation built lasting resilience.

Where we work

30 active projects across East Africa

Every project on our platform is verified, documented, and tracked from proposal to completion. Start by exploring active needs.

Kenya
142 projects · $60K raised
Uganda
43 projects · $12K raised
South Sudan
80 projects · $289K raised
